this is precisely why i don't play gacha games
don't the items expire after event is over
The only things that expire after an event is the event currency
All you need to know is which shop corresponds to which activity
yes that's what i mean, i want to know what to spend the currency on
Give me a second to open the game
This is currency you get after pulling (ignore the one with 15, thats endgame currency)
This comes from doing missions, leveling up, weekly farming and progressing story in general
This comes from doing dungeons and buying from events
